entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization focused on grain legumes

entities.name: GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: Crops with a narrow genetic base including chickpea, pigeonpea, and groundnut

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Biological factors that adversely affect the production and productivity of grain legumes

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-biological factors that adversely affect the production and productivity of grain legumes

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or fight off biotic or abiotic stresses

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to endure biotic or abiotic stresses

entities.name: WILD SPECIES
entities.description: Non-cultivated relatives of crops that harbor useful genes and thrive under climatic extremities

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of crop cultivars using wild species

entities.name: PLOIDY LEVEL DIFFERENCES
entities.description: Differences in chromosome sets between cultivated and wild species that hinder genetic improvement

entities.name: CROSS-INCOMPATIBILITY BARRIERS
entities.description: Biological barriers that prevent successful crossing between cultivated and wild species

entities.name: LINKAGE DRAG
entities.description: The introduction of undesirable traits from wild species along with desired genes

entities.name: PREBREEDING
entities.description: Systematic efforts to introgress useful genes from wild species into cultivated crops

entities.name: CICER
entities.description: Genus of wild species used as donors for chickpea

entities.name: CAJANUS
entities.description: Genus of wild species used as donors for pigeonpea

entities.name: ARACHIS
entities.description: Genus of wild species used as donors for groundnut

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cultivated grain legume (Cicer arietinum L.) used as a recipient parent

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cultivated grain legume (Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp.) used as a recipient parent

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Cultivated grain legume (Arachis hypogea L.) used as a recipient parent

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall growth and yield characteristics of the developed genepools

entities.name: GENES AND ALLELES
entities.description: Useful genetic units introgressed from wild species into cultivated crops

entities.name: YIELD-RELATED TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics that influence the productivity of the crop, used for evaluating introgression lines

entities.name: INTROGRESSION LINES
entities.description: Populations resulting from the transfer of genetic material from wild species to cultivated crops

entities.name: NARS
entities.description: National Agricultural Research Systems that receive introgression lines for breeding

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Organized efforts to develop new crop varieties using introgression lines

entities.name: CLIMATE-RESILIENT CULTIVARS
entities.description: Crop varieties developed to maintain productivity under adverse climatic conditions

entities.name: GENETIC BASE
entities.description: The total genetic diversity within a crop population, which prebreeding aims to broaden

relationships.description: ensures supply of genetic variability for
